policy: Manual semantic review selects by observable fault, property, and trigger diversity; mutation ID order is not a selection criterion.

supplemental_exact_five_reviews.finding: The gain-transfer labels repeat, but unity-gain tests a fixed transfer error while ignores-gain-parameter tests parameter override behavior across gain settings; both are observably distinct.
The spectral-error labels repeat, but no-frequency-step removes the pre/post period transition while late-switch preserves both periods at the wrong transition time; both are observably distinct.
